sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14889" key="a)rguro/xalkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρό-χαλκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n14889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">silver-copper alloy,</tr_> Mariaap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.169B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.169B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
